revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop. 5 content files produced from Danilo's void spaces + web research. OpKit created. Education-first win-back strategy replaces Danilo's discount ladder. Loop Subscriptions recommended over Danilo's Skio (6x price increase invalidated).
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong industry evidence (B-grade), honest confidence grading, actionable playbook with implementation timeline. Weakness: no IonWave-specific data (pre-launch), depletion messaging at D-grade.

files.subscription_platform.json: Platform comparison (Recharge, Skio, Stay AI, Loop). Recommendation: Loop for pre-launch.
files.subscription_psychology.md: Why people subscribe/cancel supplements. Psychological retention levers.
files.churn_prediction.json: Churn signals, composite risk scoring, dunning model, retention curve.
files.win_back_offer_ladder.md: Education-first win-back strategy replacing Danilo's discount ladder.
files.retention_playbook.md: Prioritized retention tactics (3 tiers), scenario modeling, implementation timeline.
files.opkit_subscription_retention.md: OpKit: reusable Subscription & Retention Design Kit for any DTC consumable Trade.
files.dialogue_summary.md: Persona dialogue transcript: 6 rounds, 3 personas (Skeptical Investor, Growth Engineer, Category Expert), 3 upgrades, saturated. Key insight: churn tactic stacking is non-linear.

feeds_into: M3 (Financial Model — churn rate affects LTV:CAC)
next_action: Collect actual IonWave churn data post-launch. Mine Seaonic reviews for time-to-value (upgrades HYP-003.1).
intelligence_gaps: Loop Subscriptions pricing/integration not independently verified
